title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Ecom Express

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Ecom Express
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ecom Express. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About Ecom Express:
Ecom Express is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
